data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but the evidence does not confirm that the system handles this scenario correctly. The linked use case indicates that downstream appointments should be auto-cancelled if the initial booking is modified, yet there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this behavior or any clear, actionable failure report. This constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage as the expected result is not supported by the available evidence.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior when group size changes after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
